decision: Do not feed P2 or accept the fix round. Cross-split leakage remains, and a legacy YAML bypasses both human review and balanced sampling.

blocking_findings.finding: Two additional train-to-validation video families remain leaked across different workspace and prefix conventions.
evidence: pickle-es3fs/yt-UF0i_EboHqA-0004 versus od8al/output_frame_file2_28: SSIM 0.916809, pHash [2,0,0], 2307 ORB homography inliers; visually adjacent Waters/Johns-Todd/Newman frames.
nigh-workspace/PBGAME13_mp4-0206 versus od8al/output_frame_file4_844: SSIM 0.904504, pHash [4,0,2], 1130 ORB homography inliers; same MLP San Clemente footage.
An exhaustive 9129-by-1941 train-validation scan found 30 pairs at pHash distance <=6 and 74 at <=8, all confined to these two leaked relationships.
Exact SHA-256 and .rf-hash-stripped basename scans found zero, demonstrating that cross-workspace renaming defeats the implemented detector.
The detector keys lineage by workspace channel at exporter lines 637-653 and 741-759. Ten of eleven emitted families remain UNRESOLVED_SOURCE_LEVEL_FAMILY.

blocking_findings.finding: A preserved pre-fix data.yaml remains directly trainable.
evidence: Its absolute path targets the current fixed roboflow_person directory.
Its train setting is images/train, exposing all 9129 images and bypassing the 1308-entry balanced list.
Racket-AI therefore contributes 8067/9129 images instead of 194/1308 entries.

blocking_findings.finding: A future legitimate PASS package would still bundle machine-readable PENDING audit artifacts.
evidence: exporter lines 1757-1795 always emit a blank review_template.csv and PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW audit manifest.
The completed external review CSV is not copied into the package.
Tests permit data.yaml and overall PASS without checking the bundled audit status.

blocking_findings.finding: report_fix1.json claims an explicit artifacts key, but the key is absent.

original_tsgju_version2_pair.result: tsgju frame 21, both version2 frame 20 derivatives, and seg are now validation-only in one family.

balance_core.result: Independent reconstruction was byte-identical: 1308 entries, SHA-256 2fa213f2f1c38c6e6ebd9fc9869bca1c114a31cd3ed7fc9f8bd5a746b151aa42, target 194, cap 4, Racket-AI 8067 to 194.

canonical_human_gate.result: Current canonical data.yaml is absent; review is clearly PENDING, post-quarantine retention is null, and the CLI gate has five explicit blockers.

collision.result: Fresh probes detected flip and every 5/10/20% center-crop and letterbox class at 12/12. Rotation, off-center crop, and flip-plus-crop detected 0/12; perspective warp detected 4/12. These residuals are honestly declared. Manifest hashes, 2994 protected references, 45844128 frame pairs, and 366753024 descriptor comparisons reconcile.

suite.fresh_rerun: Blocked before collection because the read-only sandbox provides no writable temporary directory; this is an environment limitation, not a test failure.

required_fix: Adjudicate the two newly proven cross-workspace video relationships, apply holdout-wins source grouping, regenerate every artifact, and honestly report PERSON_RF_POOL_TOO_THIN if only seven train families remain.
Add cross-workspace perceptual lineage checks and fail closed on unresolved original-video families.
Neutralize every legacy YAML that resolves to pending/current data and add a stale-reference regression.
On PASS, preserve the completed review CSV and emit COMPLETE audit-pack status instead of a fresh blank PENDING pack.
Add the mandatory artifacts key to report_fix1.json.
